name: br-mt-ecommerce-monorepo
description: Monorepo orquestador para la plataforma MT Middle East (MDM + Pricing). Backend FastAPI/Python, Frontend Next.js/React, IaC Terraform.

scripts.dev:backend: echo 'Use: cd mt-pricing-backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload'
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:frontend && pnpm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:backend: cd mt-pricing-backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:frontend && pnpm run typecheck:backend
scripts.typecheck:backend: cd mt-pricing-backend && uv run mypy app
scripts.test: pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run test:backend
scripts.format:backend: cd mt-pricing-backend && uv run ruff format .
